response: Gleanntáin Ghlas' Ghaoth Dobhair is a song in the Irish language written by Irish musician Proinsias Ó Maonaigh about his hometown of Gaoth Dobhair in County Donegal. It translates as "the green glens of Gweedore" and is one of the well-known Irish language songs of Ireland. The song can be heard in many Irish pubs around the world, which are licensed to serve alcoholic drinks for consumption on the premises.
